ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-13-2010 Continued To Oct-18-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Travis Reynolds for Helen Wong and Chiu Chan.

Mr. Travis stated that the Clients were coming into the office today to sign the petition, that the loan on the property was denied and that he anticipated filing the petition by the end of the day. The matter was continued to October 18, 2010 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for filing of the amended petition and the Inventory and Appraisal. If said documents are not filed by that hearing date, sanctions/surcharges will run at a rate of $25.00 per day against the Co-Administrators. Said documents are to be filed by October 13, 2010 with a hearing date of October 18, 2010.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Whitehead.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Sep-13-2010 Continued To Oct-18-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-23-2010 Continued To Sep-13-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Travis Reynolds for Helen Wong (Petitioner).

Mr. Reynolds stated that the waivers of accounting were filed on Friday, that he had a discussion with his Clients regarding taking a loan out on the property for payment of the Probate Referee's fees and that the amended petition for final distribution could be filed in two weeks. The Court reminded Counsel that more time may be needed for the Referee to do the appraisal and continued the matter to September 13, 2010 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Aug-23-2010 Continued To Sep-13-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jul-19-2010 Continued To Aug-23-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Travis Reynolds for Helen Wong and for Chiu Chan (Co-Administrators).

The Court stated that there was no compliance with the Examiner's notes dated January 29, 2010. Mr. Reynolds stated that he would re-file the petition with waivers of accountings by the Co-Administrators, that the Co-Administrators could not afford to pay the Appraiser and that he would do some research on how to pay the Appraiser. The Court informed Counsel that he could get a declaration from each of the Beneficiaries waiving the accounting and that he needed to clear the Examiner's notes. The matter was continued to August 23, 2010 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Arlene Howell, CSR#2542. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy V. Jung.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-19-2010 Continued To Aug-23-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jun-07-2010 Continued To Jul-19-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-07-2010 Continued To Jul-19-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar May-10-2010 Continued To Jun-07-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any party, counsel or interested person.

An Order to Show Cause will be issued to the Co-Administrators and the Attorney to appear and show cause as to why the Estate has not been closed, why the issues raised in the Examiner's notes dated January 29, 2010 have not been cured and why sanctions should not be imposed. The return date is June 7, 2010 at 9:00 a.m, in Dept. 204.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy F. Smith.
